_schema_notes.mode_variants: This template shows seed_discovery defaults. For forward_evaluation: set mode to "forward_evaluation", state_pack_input to the input state pack filename, input_files to the appended delta CSV filenames, warmup_buffer_files to any required warmup files, appended_delta_window start/end to the new data range, snapshot_id to the value inherited from the input state pack, and set contamination_status.blind_seed_discovery_required to false. For governance_review: set mode to "governance_review", state_pack_input to the latest state pack filename, input_files to the governance-relevant files (constitution, state pack contents, failure dossier), snapshot_id to the value inherited from the input state pack, and set contamination_status.blind_seed_discovery_required to false.

notes: Operational metadata only (data quality, download anomalies). Do NOT include research hints, prior findings, or benchmark expectations.
